titles.title: In Christ Alone My Hope Is Found

authors.author: Keith Getty
Keith Getty
In Christus ist mein ganzer Halt

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In Christ alone my hope is found He is my light, my strength, my song This Cornerstone, this solid Ground Firm through the fiercest drought and storm What heights of love, what depths of peace When fears are stilled, when strivings cease My Comforter, my All in All Here in the love of Christ I stand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In Christ alone, who took on flesh Fullness of God in helpless babe This gift of love and righteousness Scorned by the ones He came to save 'Til on that Cross as Jesus died The wrath of God was satisfied For every sin on Him was laid Here in the death of Christ I live

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There in the ground His body lay Light of the world by darkness slain Then bursting forth in glorious Day Up from the grave He rose again And as He stands in victory Sin's curse has lost its grip on me For I am His and He is mine Bought with the precious blood of Christ

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For I am His and He is mine Hallelujah, hallelujah And I am bought Bought with the precious blood of Christ Hallelujah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No guilt in life, no fear in death This is the power of Christ in me From life's first cry to final breath Jesus commands my destiny No pow'r of hell, no scheme of man Can ever pluck me from His hand 'Til He returns or calls me home Here in the power of Christ I'll stand
